name: Entergy Corporation
description: Entergy Corporation is an integrated energy company engaged primarily in electric power production and retail distribution operations in the Deep South of the United States. The company owns and operates power plants with approximately 24,000 megawatts of electric generating capacity, including about 5,000 megawatts of nuclear power. Entergy delivers electricity to 3 million utility customers in Arkansas, Louisiana, Mississippi, and Texas. As a major player in the utility sector, Entergy is committed to providing reliable and sustainable energy solutions while maintaining a significant nuclear generation portfolio to support its clean energy goals.
